title: Batch recall alert - Folltropin 700 IU Powder and Solvent for Solution for Injection
body: "We wish to inform veterinarians and wholesalers that Vetoquinol has initiated a Class I recall to veterinarian level with immediate effect for the below mentioned product.  The reason for the recall is due to the presence of particles in stored samples of the diluent.  UK (GB): Vm 08007/5005 by Vetoquinol UK Limited  UK (NI): Vm 06462/3026 (Vm 08007/3004) by Vetoquinol SA     Batch number Expiry date     4K128A Feb 2028     Vetoquinol is contacting veterinarians and wholesalers to examine inventory immediately and quarantine products subject to this recall.  For further information regarding the recall, please contact Vetoquinol: 01280 814500 (Option 1) or UK_office@vetoquinol.com "
